title: veridict sprt report
description: JSON output of `veridict sprt`, for --sprt-variant wald (default), trinomial, and pentanomial.

schema_version.description: Stays 1 across additive changes; bumps only when a field is removed or renamed.

elo0.description: H0 hypothesis gap. Logistic Elo for wald, BayesElo for trinomial - see docs/metrics.md for why these are different scales.

alpha.description: Guaranteed false-positive rate (accepting H1 when H0 is true) - not a tunable report threshold.

beta.description: Guaranteed false-negative rate (accepting H0 when H1 is true).

drawelo.description: Estimated draw-rate nuisance parameter. Some only for --sprt-variant trinomial (reported for transparency, since it's estimated from the same data being judged); null for wald/pentanomial, neither of which models a draw rate.

pentanomial_counts.description: Some only for --sprt-variant pentanomial: the 5-value breakdown the LLR was computed from (candidate_wins/baseline_wins/draws above are still populated too, netted from these same 5 buckets); null for wald/trinomial.

raw_trial_count.description: Some only for --sprt-variant pentanomial: total input records before pairing (always 2 * paired_count, since an incomplete pair is rejected before a report is produced).

paired_count.description: Some only for --sprt-variant pentanomial: number of complete pairs the LLR was computed over.
